name: dageno-mcp-growth-playbook
description: Turn Dageno content opportunities into new SEO + GEO content briefs by analyzing response gaps, citation URLs, keyword demand, and intent.

seo_metrics_api.recommended_provider: any approved search volume and keyword difficulty API

serp_retrieval.recommended_provider: approved SERP API or user-provided export

metadata.minimum_permissions: Dageno API access required; SEO metrics, page fetch, and SERP enrichment are optional connectors.
metadata.data_access_policy: This skill is optimized for new-content generation from Dageno opportunities. Do not assume hidden access to private search APIs, page crawlers, or Google scraping. Fall back to Dageno response and citation inputs plus user-provided connectors when optional systems are missing.
